title: Flea Treatment in Irvington, Westchester | $350 - $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Irvington, Westchester. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350 to $650. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Irvington home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Irvington and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your property is flea-free and safe for your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Irvington residents for years with fast, effective flea treatments tailored to the unique needs of Westchester homes. Our experienced team uses family-safe and pet-friendly products, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee to give you complete peace of mind.
localContext: Irvington's historic homes along the Hudson River and tree-lined neighborhoods create ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in properties with pets or wildlife activity. From the estates near Matthiessen Park to the charming residences in the Village Center, our team understands the specific pest challenges facing Irvington homeowners and provides customized solutions.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Irvington typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly. However, because flea eggs and pupae can remain dormant, a follow-up treatment after 2-3 weeks is often recommended to ensure complete elimination of the entire flea life cycle.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our certified technicians. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, after which the space is completely safe to occupy.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention. Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Irvington and Westchester County, subject to technician availability. Contact us early in the day for the best chance of same-day service.
